A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Zookeeper: Zookeeper (2011)
programme.desc: The animals at one particular zoo decide to break their code of silence in order to help their lovable zookeeper gain the attention of one particular woman.

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that’s a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: Forget office politics, only the smartest will survive this bloody office outing.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bellagio Cup V - Part 1
programme.desc: In what could be the toughest WPT final table ever, eight-time WSOP bracelet winner and WPT Champion Erik Seidel takes on five hungry young pros in the kickoff event of Season Eight on the World Poker Tour.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bellagio Cup V - Part 2
programme.desc: The action in Las Vegas continues as what could be the toughest WPT final table ever heats up in pursuit of a million dollar payday.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Legends of Poker
programme.desc: Poker veterans Toto Leonidas and Prahlad Friedman lead the attack at the final table of the Legends of Poker as six poker pros go after a WPT title and a million dollar payday.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata Poker Open
programme.desc: The largest field in World Poker Tour history produces a final table with one of the biggest WPT personalities ever as hard drinking, fun loving, trash talking Jumbo Pressure Jeremy Brown tries to bully his way to a win on the WPT.

programme.title: The 39 Steps
programme.desc: A man in London tries to help a counter-espionage Agent. But when the Agent is killed, and the man stands accused, he must go on the run to save himself and stop a spy ring that is trying to steal top-secret information.

programme.title: A Star is Born
programme.desc: A young woman comes to Hollywood with dreams of stardom, but achieves them only with the help of a man whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: Naked as Nature Intended
programme.desc: Naked As Nature Intended sees four young beauties enjoying the sights of the West Country while exploring the joys of nudism. A nudie-cutie feature from the early days of naturism!

programme.title: Christiane F.
programme.desc: A teen girl in 1970's Berlin becomes addicted to heroin. Everything in her life slowly begins to distort and disappear as she befriends a small crew of junkies and falls in love with a drug-abusing male prostitute.

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: The Package
programme.desc: A courier for a crime lord (Steve Austin) must deliver a mysterious package while being chased by a horde of unusual gangsters. Also starring Dolph Lundgren and Monique Ganderton.

programme.title: Lost Behind Bars
programme.desc: A woman author travels to a small Oregon town to research her latest book - the story of a crime committed by a young man who's now sitting on death row. As she digs for the facts, it soon becomes clear that the wrong person has been convicted.

programme.title: Family Games
programme.desc: Sloane and her boyfriend Barrett return to her childhood home determined to ruin her father Roan's re-marriage. Family secrets surface and give rise to a puzzling future.

programme.title: Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: The summer of 1964... Two FBI agents--one a tight-jawed, by-the-book type, the other an experienced Southern lawman who knows how to handle people--head the government's investigation into the disappearance of three civil rights activists in Mississippi.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: InControl
programme.desc: A group of students discover a device that allows them to control and experience the world through someone else’s eyes. As they push the machine to its limits, they realise they have been manipulated and descend into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: Set in the near future, an elite squad of highly trained marines is sent on a training exercise to a remote island, home to advanced military robots.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella & Big Boy, and Gracie
programme.desc: Marley and Me author John Grogan gets a new yellow Lab. Just like Marley, Gracie needs lessons in respect. Paul Frank Industries lets employees bring their dogs to work.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Woody & Wally, various dogs, and Kane
programme.desc: Cesar shows mail carriers in Roswell, Georgia, how to deal with close encounters of the four-legged kind. Next, Cesar meets a pair of Pomeranians that flip out when left alone.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tori, Cassie & Skyler, and Tallulah, Bella, Boris, & Groucho, and Howie
programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and an abused lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Dexter and Nasir
programme.desc: A Chicago art teacher wants to unify her adopted Rottweiler/shepherd’s dual personality. Singer Patti LaBelle is afraid of her guard dog, an aggressive 150-pound South African boerboel.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Calvin, Rudy, and Milo
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix needs help recovering from a car accident that left him with three-legs; a manic Jack Russell chases motorcycles; and a border collie's herding instincts are out of control.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Titan, Candy and Bella
programme.desc: A new puppy has "Young and Restless" soap star Michael Damian's cat cornered, MTV's "Downtown" Julie Brown wants to unspoil her Yorkie, and a 120-pound Rottweiler needs anger management training.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death in the Dressing Room
programme.desc: Murder and blackmail culminate when a call for help during a Javenese dance is the clue that Colonel March needs to prove a faulty alibi.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The New Invisible Man
programme.desc: Colonel March receives a queer complaint: a pair of disembodied gloves killed a manand there is no corpse, no blood, and no evidence of wrongdoing,

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: A psychologist is stabbed to death in a seemingly sealed room. Inspector March must find who killed him and how did they accomplish the task.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense
programme.desc: Colonel March's niece, a believer in spiritualism, hears her dead husband's voice and becomes convinced he has returned as a ghost; but has he?

programme.title: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: A group of kids are trapped in the woods and methodically killed off by a horrifying flesh-eating virus.

programme.title: FIFA U-17 World Championship
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Ghana and Brazil played at North Harbour Stadium, Auckland on Nov. 24, 1999.

programme.title: Lionel Messi Shining Bright in the World Cup
programme.desc: Enjoy the Argentine player's brilliance against Nigeria in the 2014 FIFA World Cup™ and against Croatia in Qatar 2022™.

programme.title: FIFA U-17 World Championship
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between France and Argentina played at Hasely Crawford Stadium, Port of Spain on Sept. 27, 2001.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A CIA operative (Jackie Chan) must protect his girlfriend's children from a Russian terrorist after one kid mistakenly downloads a top-secret formula.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: A discovery made by a kung fu obsessed American teen sends him on an adventure to China, where he joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Days
programme.desc: With help from his two sidekicks (Jackie Chan, Cécile de France), an eccentric inventor (Steve Coogan) bets he can circle the globe in less than three months.

programme.title: The Crucible Cup
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker 900

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Businessman and rookie miner Dennis gambles $500,000 on a 62-acre gold mine, while Leigh asks two British backpackers for a lesson in metal detecting.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: It's D-Day for the Clermont Diggers - they have just 48 hours to repay investor Dennis. Meanwhile, Rob's gold haul is washed down the river.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Rookie miner Dennis enjoys a personal-best nugget find in a bumper day, while the Mineshaft Hunters' quest for gold is cut short when a team member takes a life threatening fall.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt starts in Turin with the controversial Shroud, moves to Ice Age Spain and a fraud-tainted discovery, then to Manchester where a statue seems to move and ends with the cursed blue diamond tied to misery and bloodshed.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure takes us to the Bay of Naples and the doomed Roman city of Pompeii, where items stolen by tourists have created misery and misfortune.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the historical Kingdom of Benin, Africa. Destroyed in 1897, with its city burned to the ground and precious artefacts looted, did this bloody and violent end lead to a curse?

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Gail has a leaky ceiling and bowing floor boards but can't make repairs because her house is packed full. Meanwhile, Warren's fridge collection is putting his son at risk.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A former international supermodel fills her home with trash-bin treasures. A man moves the contents of his shoe-repair business into his home.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Joanne must clear up or hand her six-year-old grandson over to authorities. Meanwhile, hotheaded hoarder Verna claims her mess is 'artistic expression'.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Augustine's son Jason has been taken away from her by social services, and it has not been possible for him to return home. Augustine now lives without water, gas and heating, and the authorities have intervened to force her to clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A check-in on the progress of past hoarders, including Betty, Jill, Jake, Bill, and Paul from the first season.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: While staging a play, Cyril believes his theater is haunted. Strange events cause panic, but the truth behind the “ghost” reveals a more grounded explanation.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril pursues a romance that quickly becomes complicated. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric face fears during skydiving, learning to overcome anxiety in different ways.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril is hospitalized, leaving the pigs in charge of a major deal. Chaos ensues, while Bert tries to recover money from a bad purchase, leading to parallel struggles with responsibility.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph’s family moves to Evergreen, bringing change and adjustment challenges. Meanwhile, the pigs take new jobs, leading to humorous clashes as everyone adapts to new roles.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril assigns Cedric to develop a new product, leading to unexpected discoveries. Meanwhile, a mysterious garbage train raises questions the gang must investigate.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley tries to repay a debt through a risky scheme that traps him and the pigs in caverns. Bert and others must rescue them, learning that shortcuts often lead to bigger problems.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley excels at work and earns a promotion, angering the pigs. Their sabotage backfires, and Cyril must fix the situation while recognizing Bentley’s true value.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert overcommits while preparing for a fair, trying to please everyone. Meanwhile, the pigs run another scheme. Both storylines show the cost of taking on too much.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley learns martial arts but faces challenges with discipline and trust. His mentor’s past complicates things, forcing Bentley to prove his dedication.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril launches a satellite service, while a mishap traps Broo inside it. A race against time ensues as the gang works to bring him back safely.

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch

programme.desc: Despite his success, Sam Raimi loses his creative freedom as Marvel and Sony’s tug of war begins to affect the story. Spider-man 3 conquers the box office but loses the fans, as Sam decides whether to carry on or walk away.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Sony reboots the franchise with a new director and a new Spider-man, but can this new version compete with the rise of the MCU? When hackers attack Sony, their plans for the webslinger come undone and an unprecedented deal is struck.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Spider-man comes home to Marvel, but can Marvel and Sony get along enough to keep him there? The franchise comes full circle, bringing everyone back together in a time of crisis.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom Cruise steps into the spotlight, taking the lead in Risky Business, but when Paul Brickman is forced to change his ending will that put an end to Tom’s dreams?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom Cruise enters the danger zone as Tony Scott pushes the limits of the Navy and his actors to achieve his sun-kissed vision.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Milan, Italy to search for Casanova's lost Book of Love.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: To cross Nightmare Land, Monkey disguises Tripitaka as a demon woman with magic. Tested by the King of Bad Dreams, their fate hangs on whether he sees through the disguise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Near India, the pilgrims are stopped by the King of Geological Ages. Tripitaka is shackled with the Iron Collar of Death. Pigsy recognizes the queen—can they save their master in time?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey, Pigsy, and Sandy grow tired of their journey and part ways. Monkey returns to the Kingdom of Fruit and Flowers, reflecting on the mission and his restless spirit.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The evil Dogs of Plague, followers of the Great Hound of Hell, set out to destroy Monkey, Pigsy, Sandy, and Tripitaka in a battle of wit and strength.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Shotenki and his demon master Kokufki lure men from nearby villages to their casino in Ittakudo, where gambling consumes their lives and fortunes.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A judge (William Windom) can save his son from a phony murder charge by acquitting a gangster of income-tax evasion.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The slain member of a famous string quartet recorded a prediction of his death months earlier; guest Tim Matheson.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside's investigation of a possible suicide reveals the identity of a stranger (Nico Minardos) who disappeared after helping Fran.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Only experimental spinal surgery can save sniper victim Brown from paralysis; guests Vic Morrow, E.G. Marshall.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside takes a course in dog training to learn why two previously reliable canines failed to stop jewel thieves; guest Anthony Zerbe.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Open And Shut Case
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) faith in the legal system is tested when a solid homicide case crumbles and a friend and former rape victim is forced to relive her courtroom ordeal. Also staring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Jane Doe #37
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) refuses to drop the investigation into a murdered Jane Doe, who also happens to be a homeless woman. Cagney is determined to discover her real identity before her burial. Also starring Tyne Daly, Al Waxman, and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Date Rape
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are at odds over the investigation of a rape case. Cagney sides with the male investigators who feel the woman is at fault, while Lacey sides with the woman. Things become more complicated when the woman's past is used against her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Burn-Out
programme.desc: When Lacey's vacation is temporarily postponed, she becomes overwhelmed with her responsibilities as a cop, wife, and mother. Meanwhile, Cagney goes undercover as a nun to investigate drugs that have gone missing from a hospital.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Chop Shop
programme.desc: Detective Victor Isbecki's cover is blown during an investigation of a dangerous car theft ring and he becomes a hostage. Cagney and Lacey must work to help save him while coming to terms with their own failures in the investigation.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: At first, Karen Welch thinks nothing of the mysterious call she receives on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Wolf In Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Judy Phillips is recovering from kidney disease when she meets a handsome young man. But, soon, he reveals a taste for cruelty.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Virtual Nightmare
programme.desc: Up-and-coming pop star Elle Richardson is bombarded with threatening emails from a stranger hell-bent on destroying her career and ruining her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: When Jessica takes out a restraining order against her ex-husband, he vows to get her back. When police won't protect her, Jessica is left to face the horrors that will change her life forever.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Predator By Proxy
programme.desc: After Angell kicks her ex-husband Michael out of the house, he returns for revenge. Michael creates fake advertisements that send strange men right to Angell's door.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off The Rails
programme.desc: When train engineer Dinah Lynch rejects the advances of her coworker, Stanley, he launches a crusade to punish her at all costs.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Shortcut to Murder
programme.desc: On August 7th 1997, popular university student, Sarah Whitehead, is walking home from the local mall when she is brutally raped and strangled in broad daylight. The 20-year-old’s body is found in a greenbelt near her North Bay, Ontario home.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: On July 13th, 1994, three members of the Rafay family are brutally murdered in their new home… Later the same night, the family’s teenage son and his best friend discover the gruesome scene and call for help.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Collective Justice
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blind Trust
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Willie McCarty is found at the base of a staircase. Neighbors direct Kenda to a truck spotted fleeing the scene, but a surprise visitor at CSPD turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A nine year old girl scout disappears while delivering cookies to a neighbor.

programme.title: On the Case: Smoke and Ashes
programme.desc: A beautiful bride to be is murdered when a bomb explodes as she enters her home.

programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: A beloved father of two is executed after a friendly poker game. Were the stakes too high? Or would police find the truth much closer to home?

programme.title: On the Case: In the Shadows of Home
programme.desc: September 2nd, 2011. 15-year-old Alyssa Otremba called her mom to ask permission to meet a friend to get a textbook to do her homework. It was late in the afternoon, but her mother believed Alyssa could get the book and be back before dark.

programme.title: On the Case: Almost Home
programme.desc: A young woman's battered body is found on the side of the road. The shocking evidence from the crime leads police down a trail of tragedy.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: Nicholas Brophy is excited to start his senior year of high school in Thompson, Manitoba. But, after going out to visit a friend late on a school night, he never returns.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When a bomb kills a young paraplegic mother, authorities must determine if it was sent by a drug dealer seeking revenge or someone much closer to the victim

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When a retired pro-wrestler is brutally murdered in the Manitoba hamlet of Inwood, police coordinate a massive sting operation that brings to light a savage small-town conspiracy.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When hardware store clerk Sydney Loofe vanishes after an online date, the entire state of Nebraska finds themselves on high alert. Investigators race against the clock to find her, as her family clutches onto the hope that Sydney is unharmed.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours To Kill
programme.desc: The key to solving the toughest homicides lies somewhere within the final 24 hours of the victim's life. This true-crime documentary series follows investigators as they piece together events.

programme.title: Homicide: Hours To Kill
programme.desc: The key to solving the toughest homicides lies somewhere within the final 24 hours of the victim's life. This true-crime documentary series follows investigators as they piece together events.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: A report on the 26-year effort of Bruce Lisker to overturn his conviction for the murder of his mother. In March 1983, 17-year-old Bruce Lisker called 911 to tell police that he had found his mother, Dorka Lisker, beaten severely and stabbed in her home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Body of Lies
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The One Who Got Away
programme.desc: A report about how serial killer Andrew Urdiales was identified, arrested and convicted, and about the young woman who became the only one of his victims to survive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Full Moon
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Choice
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NEW The Dating Game Killer: Smooth Talker (Part 1)
programme.desc: With a string of murders already behind him, Rodney Alcala is chosen to appear on the game show, “The Dating Game.” What happens next makes him one of the most horrific killers in US history.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NEW The Dating Game Killer: The Bite Mark (Part 2)
programme.desc: With a string of murders already behind him, Rodney Alcala is chosen to appear on the game show, “The Dating Game.” What happens next makes him one of the most horrific killers in US history.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Felix Navidad
programme.desc: When Felix learns that his perfectionist mother Meredith (Jessica Walter) cannot host Christmas this year, he goes into a frenzy as he prepares to take over the Unger family Christmas traditions.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: To avoid a night of boredom, Oscar suggests that Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) take Felix out on their artsy cultural dates in his place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Should She Stay or Should She Go?
programme.desc: Felix meets a fun-loving woman, Natasha (Busy Phillips), in a bar and takes her home for what is meant to be a one-night stand.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Batman vs. The Penguin
programme.desc: Murph gets Oscar to agree to participate in a regular TV segment where he competes with a penguin at the zoo to predict the winners of hockey games.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When Oscar is hired to ghostwrite the autobiography of a retired baseball player, Felix offers his "help" by advising Murph to go in a different direction, making Oscar's job more difficult. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: When Oscar realizes he's forgotten Felix's birthday, he pulls together a last-minute surprise party in his honor in an attempt to impress Casey. Dwight Howard guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Buck Ruxton was a well-respected GP and was greatly admired by his patients. But behind his respectable exterior, there lurked a duplicitous and jealous man.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: A bizarre murder case began when police attended the scene of a dog barking outside a camper van. Inside, they found its owner, Tony Robinson, murdered.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Despite only being trialled and convicted for the death of a single victim, Mary Ann Cotton is often classed as Britain's worst female serial killer.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a murderer terrorised Edinburgh, killing young women in what became known as 'The World's End Murders'. 37 years later, Angus Sinclair would be convicted.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: When Maria Muñoz dies from an overdose, it looks like suicide. That is until doorbell camera footage reveals a dark story of love, betrayal and murder.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case
programme.desc: On September 7, 2018, in Strasbourg, Sophie Le Tan is about to celebrate her 20th birthday with her family.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaff Case)

programme.title: NEW SERIES Copycat Killers
programme.desc: Ari Squire fakes his death after watching Forensic Files, aiming to collect life insurance.

programme.title: NEW SERIES Copycat Killers
programme.desc: Jason Moore recreates Freddy Krueger's weapon to kill his only friend, inspired by A Nightmare on Elm Street.

programme.title: The Case: The Stone Cutter (Daniel Roussette)
programme.desc: It all began with the discovery of the body of an old lady in the forest at Pacy-sur-Eure by hunters.

programme.title: The Case: Serial Rapist (Guy Bertrand)

programme.title: The Case: The Last Tango (Bertrand Gelineau)
programme.desc: In November 2006, the relatives of Nicole Saada, a woman in her sixties, came to report her disappearance.

programme.title: NEW SERIES Vanity Fair Confidential
programme.desc: One young woman lives in constant, debilitating fear; another will never forget how she faced her own death.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Dade County police in Georgia work to uncover the identity of a Jane Doe and locate the perpetrator responsible for her murder.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Sierra Nevada, 1977, a horseback ride turns into a nightmare when a group of riders discover a woman's dead body, discarded amongst the scenery.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When the body of nine-year-old Marise Chiverella was discovered in 1964, her Pennsylvania hometown lived in fear that a child predator was hiding in plain sight, but the truth would not be revealed for over 50 years.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In California, 1968, a group of schoolboys find what they think is a scarecrow. The reality is much worse: it is the body of a woman who has been murdered.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: For 15 years, northern California is haunted by a serial rapist until genetic genealogy finally reveals the identity of the elusive sexual predator.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry persuades the vicar to let him run the local charity auction.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry throws himself enthusiastically into using `Citizens' Band' radio, but June is far from thrilled.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Anxious to make Tarquin and Melinda envious when they come to dinner, Terry decides to buy a goldfish pond for his back garden.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into the death of Nikitta Grender and the extensive forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The search for Lori Hacking follows the investigation into her disappearance and how a multitude of forensic techniques revealed her killer.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Old Nick Theatre

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Diamond
programme.desc: Henrik Durvard has taken over the country of Lombuanada by a military coup, and holds the natives in terror. He has obtained a diamond from the native miners, and the IMF is assigned to take it away from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Legend
programme.desc: An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Snowball In Hell
programme.desc: A former prison guard, Sefra, has acquired a supply of cesium 138, which explodes at temperatures above 70 degrees.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Confession
programme.desc: The team must break a Communist assassin who killed a U.S. Senator.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Action!
programme.desc: Miklos Klaar, an Iron Curtain filmmaker, has film of American soldiers and plans to edit it into an atrocity movie to discredit the U.S.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Ton and Allen hit the road for Nashville, where they rumble with a band of tough, high-bidding bikers. The day explodes when the guys discover a 37 millimeter anti-tank gun and a cowboy's rodeo saddle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Multiple Spirit Disorder
programme.desc: Watch as spirits and shadowy figures plague three different family’s lives.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Terrifying Visions

programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.desc: An evil spirit tells a woman to leave her home, and a ghost gets jealous.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Within These Walls
programme.desc: Meet people who get more than they bargained for when they buy haunted homes.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Florida
programme.desc: Ed, Beth and their toddler soon learn they are not alone at their ranch house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: Young David suffers from intense nightmares and is physically attacked by an invisible entity.

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door

programme.title: A Haunting: Child’s Play
programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After getting a call that a wife and mother had been missing for 10 years, sheriffs launch an investigation that uncovers a web of lies that leads them to the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a missing woman is discovered by a deputy to be murdered in the backyard of her family home, investigators must learn whether the victim was killed by a mysterious driver seen lingering outside the house, or someone unexpected.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime. After investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts. Those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A Navy veteran is brutally beaten during a home robbery. In order to find the killer, police must sift through various lies as several suspects desperately attempt to cover their tracks.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Andrew Bagby, a Canadian medical student, starts dating fellow student Shirley. But, after Andrew accepts a job in the United States, Shirley isn't ready to let him go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: Christen thinks she's met her college sweetheart but she breaks things off when he reveals his cruel nature. When John's dark past is publically exposed, John stops at nothing to get revenge.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Twist of Hate
programme.desc: When Dawn is ready to move on from her partner, he begins a vicious campaign of stalking and threatening both her reputation and her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Death Spiral
programme.desc: Linda is hoping for love when she meets Jim, but his charm lasts only as long as he doesn't drink. Unable to stay sober, Jim becomes determined to keep Linda all to himself...even if it kills her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off The Rails
programme.desc: When train engineer Dinah Lynch rejects the advances of her coworker, Stanley, he launches a crusade to punish her at all costs.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: By all appearances, the Carters were a happy family. Life farming the land in Iowa was tough, yet rewarding, and it brought them closer together.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: On Halloween morning 1999, the quiet in the Boston suburb of Wellesley was broken by the screams of Dirk Greineder when he found his wife, Mabel, brutally beaten in their neighborhood park.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Where's Ronnie?
programme.desc: Deena gets emotional at her baby shower, Mike and Lauren host their wedding rehearsal dinner, and Ronnie's personal woes create tension with the rest of the group.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Tuxedo Time
programme.desc: Ahead of Mike and Lauren's wedding, Ronnie opens up to Vinny and Pauly about his relationship problems, and Jenni and Nicole help their daughters prepare for flower girl duty.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground, Hogan causes a marital tiff, which, to fix, requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission, Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalter's alert brother-in-law, who enjoys tormenting prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilot's resistance to interrogation, Hogan brings the man's fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogan's set-up at Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan enlists an attractive agent's help in blackmailing Gen. Burkhalter so Klink won't be punished for the destruction of a newly built radio tower.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To improve the camp's inspection rating, Klink transfers in a stern German sergeant who quickly makes life miserable for staff and prisoners alike with his overly strict and unwavering adherence to all regulations. All want him gone.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Allies give Hogan a solo mission: attend a baron's party as Commandant Klink. Burkhalter gets involved when he learns that Klink's name sits at the very top of the guest list.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink nabs a spy, so Hogan takes the focus off his catch by making Klink think someone's trying to kill the commandant himself, leading Klink to have Hogan become a decoy commandant.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Wildest Places: Antarctic
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Asia: The Arid Heart
programme.desc: Staying alive in Asia’s barren heartland of desert and dry grasslands is a challenge, yet many animals thrive.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Containing one third of the world's trees, the frozen forests of the Taiga are the lungs of the planet. This great forest spans across shores of the Pacific, sheltering some of the Earth's most majestic animals, and some of its most secretive.

programme.title: Wild Sex
programme.desc: Sex is at the heart of everything, driving touching courtships and fierce battles, it can change an animals purpose and persona. This is the story of how wild things get sexy.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All My Children
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joining the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rain Check
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Love on the Run
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jump Start
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Ice Man
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Tickets To The Fun Show
programme.desc: During Duck Commander's "Casino Night" party, Si Robertson wins the grand prize of $2000 and decides to buy a massage chair for the duck call room. The massage chair becomes a detriment to the workflow, so Willie takes Si around for a replacement prize.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Sadie, has a homecoming dance coming up, but Willie doesn't approve of her dress selection. Willie decides to take Sadie out to find her a new "appropriate" dress.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ring Around the Redneck
programme.desc: Though Jase lost his wedding ring long ago, Missy decides it's time for Jase to replace it with a new one. When Jase is duck hunting, once again, he loses the ring.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Reunion
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Source
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Goodbye, Mr. Zelinka

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: What On Earth

programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The O'Hare UFO Incident
programme.desc: Richard investigates a UFO sighting over Chicago's O'Hare airport that was witnessed by dozens of people, including an airline captain, his crew and several airport officials.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: American writer and historan Janice Bennett goes on a quest to prove the Holy Chalice of Valencia - a relic displayed within its cathedral for over 500 years - is the original cup of Christ used at the Last Supper.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1924, a girl found a quartz crystal skull in Central America, believing it had telepathic powers. Legend says thirteen such skulls will unlock life’s mysteries. Modern science has debunked their authenticity, despite some being in museums.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Ralegh Radford stares into an empty pit; has he found the final resting place of King Arthur, the wielder of Excalibur, the founder of Camelot and the Lord of the Round Table?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: University students Holly Dunn and Chris Maier are ambushed along railway tracks in August 1997. By 1999, a string of similar attacks leads police to Angel Maturino Reséndiz, who travels by freight train between murders across three states.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers
programme.desc: Women usually kill in their own peculiar way: sophisticated, tactically, and from behind. They prefer tainted medicines, knives, or poison. And they often kill for years, unnoticed and in secret.

programme.title: scienceNOW: Where Did We Come From?
programme.desc: Hosted by Neil deGrasse Tyson, examine these topics: Revealing the Origins of Life; Origins of the Solar System; Lice and Human Evolution; and a profile of neuroscientist Andre Fenton who studies how brains store and experience memories.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.

programme.title: World War A - When Aliens Attack
programme.desc: Are there extraterrestrials and what will happen when aliens attack us?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Burma: The Forgotten Front (Spring 1943)
programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Sicily

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Bombing of Ploesti
programme.desc: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a daring 1943 mission.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Monte Cassino (September 3, 1943)
programme.desc: As the allies make their way into Italy, they encounter tremendous resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line. One of these locations is an ancient monastery called Monte Cassino.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Gilbert Islands (November 1943)
programme.desc: Bloody fighting erupts on a group of tiny Pacific islands in November 1943.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Anzio
programme.desc: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Kwajalein
programme.desc: Examining the battle at the Kwajelein Atoll in the South Pacific during 1944. Included: operations by the Seabees.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Krakus
programme.desc: Krakus, a cop from the future, arrives and thinking that the Turtles are in league with Titanus, shakes them down for information.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek
programme.desc: Krang activates his new dimensional portal, thanks to Shredder's installation of the Energy Transmitter at the Power Relay Station, giving him access to Dimension X.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja
programme.desc: While watching video tapes of old battles, Raphael sees a mystery person spying on them. While the Turtles investigate, an alien warlord named Dregg sends his TechnoGansters to steal all the gold on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to let them know that Dregg has landed on Earth and is preparing a press conference. The Turtles rush to meet April at the Park, where they hear Dregg announce his intentions and offers the world his molecular converter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Wrath of Medusa
programme.desc: Believing that the Turtles are the only thing that stands between him and total domination of the planet, Dregg makes contact with Medusa, a sinisterly beautiful alien.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Showdown
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to inform them that all the TV stations in the City are jammed. Sleazebug tries to recruit the Turtles for a martial arts tournament.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Carter the Enforcer
programme.desc: Splinter convinces the Turtles that it is their duty to fight evil, even when the whole world is against them. Carter and the Turtles team up with April to get the goods on Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Total Drama Island
programme.desc: The campers begin to disappear after watching a horror movie.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: In Beerus' castle, Champa decides that the tournament should be held on the Nameless Planet, Bulma suggests summoning Shenron to find the remaining Super Dragon Balls, and a new member to the team rivals Goku's strength.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Vegeta search for two worthy members to join the team to fill out its ranks, allowing them to participate in the tournament, but it is unclear who will be worthy to face the Sixth Universe alongside them.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Jaco takes Bulma to the all-knowing alien, Master Zuno, to learn more about the Super Dragon Balls; Jaco and Bulma run across an intergalactic criminal and take him down.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to head to the tournament, but Goku and Vegeta hold things up by arriving late from training. Once on the 'Planet With No Name', the fighters size up their competition, which includes a Saiyan from Universe Six.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Botamo kick off their match and Botamo displays a surprising resilience to Goku's attacks; Goku faces his next opponent, Frost, a close doppelgänger of his universe's Frieza.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: After Goku's sudden defeat, Piccolo steps into the ring; Frost continues to be a challenge despite Piccolo's best strategy, until an accusation of foul play shocks everyone.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta and Frost demand to fight without disqualifications; Goku gets reinstated into the tournament; Champa establishes a new rule without Beerus' consent; teammates from Universe 6 have an altercation outside the arena.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Magetta starts a heat wave, causing Vegeta to broil inside the ring's barrier, but the Saiyan manages to unleash his full power against his opponent.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers travel back to Auropolis for the sixth Battle Judgment match and take care of some unfinished business.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Lightning is summoned to space in order to represent all of dog-kind in an age-old feud.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and the gang bump into a Pokémon magician, and soon they're on the hunt to find components for her greatest spell yet!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After yet another close encounter with Team Rocket, Pikachu is left exhausted and weak. Thankfully, a passerby takes our heroes to a nearby lake that helps recharge Electric types…but also hides a great secret!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes take time out to enjoy the entertainment of a young Trainer and her Igglybuff variety act. But it's not long before Team Rocket arrives and tries to steal the show!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A chance trip to a SlowPoké temple gives our heroes an opportunity to seek enlightenment…and gives Team Rocket the chance to lighten some pockets!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A lavish celebrity event inspires Jessie and James to pretend to be the VIPs and fill their rumbling tummies. But it's not long before their disguises are put to the test by the real guest of honor: Professor Oak!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When our heroes spot an object falling from the night sky, they rush to investigate. Soon, they find themselves joining forces with a Pokémon mystery club to uncover the secrets shared by the fallen Cleffa and the stars above!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and Misty get into an argument over who can take on a powerful Trainer and his Poliwrath. When he accepts both challenges, the tough battles that follow give Misty some ideas for her own Poliwhirl!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hearing of a nearby amusement park for battling, Ash is eager to test his skills. But the Team Rocket trio have recently joined the park, and they have a few ideas in store to test this Trainer's mettle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity for Misty's Politoed when it gets roped into replacing the leader of a Pokémon Cheer team...but where has the other Politoed gone?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Blackthorn City, Ash meets Gym Leader Clair, who is busy training her Dratini for a ceremony. But Team Rocket has other plans for the Dragon-type Pokémon, and Ash and Clair must work together to stop them!

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa makes some adjustments on the switch panel. The Teletubbies watch Sam and his mum blow some long horns.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies watch some children making hay. A tree appears in Teletubbyland and the Noo-Noo tidies up all the Teletubbies favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have trouble getting out of bed. The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children feeding swans.
